xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for repo housekeeping (gitignore + leftover artifacts)

plan.title: Repo housekeeping: track cost-estimate doc + xBRIEF history, gitignore local churn

narratives.Overview: Clean up the last uncommitted dirtiness in the working tree with the correct per-file treatment, landed as a small housekeeping PR against main. Commit the legitimately-shippable leftovers (COST-ESTIMATE.md project doc, the completed 2026-07-18-cost-estimate xBRIEF, and the cancelled 2026-07-22-meditation-horns xBRIEF) into the repo's xBRIEF/doc history. Decide whether xbrief/.triage-cache/** and xbrief/.eval/** are intentionally tracked Deft state or local machine churn; if churn, gitignore them and git rm --cached; if intentionally tracked, leave them. Prefer the less-destructive option when in doubt.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: COST-ESTIMATE.md and the completed/cancelled xBRIEF artifacts are committed to main via a housekeeping PR. FR-2: The tracked-vs-ignored decision for xbrief/.triage-cache/** and xbrief/.eval/** is made from evidence (existing .gitignore, Deft docs, git history) and applied correctly. NFR-1: Required CI check no-mixed-core-and-app passes (no .deft/core changes) and the PR merges via merge-commit convention. NFR-2: Working tree ends clean or with only ignored churn remaining.

items.title: Decide tracked-vs-ignored treatment for xbrief/.triage-cache and xbrief/.eval from evidence
Commit COST-ESTIMATE.md + completed/cancelled xBRIEF artifacts via a housekeeping PR
Get required CI green and land the housekeeping PR; leave working tree clean
